violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (container tomato sauce and dairy products) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

2 dr Refrigerator located in the (dining area) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures 47DF.PIC removed TCS food product to another unit. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS products in unit until repaired/replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

The floors in kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
